title: Charosheth #2800
definition:
Harosheth = "woodland"

 1) a city in the north of the land of Canaan on the west coast of the
    lake Merom
nasbUsage:
Definition: Harosheth = "woodland"

 1) a city in the north of the land of Canaan on the west coast of the
    lake Merom

    NASB:  a place in Pal.
